g.title: note
g.text: Software can preload B once, then call run_preloaded for many A tiles.
This is the tile-level weight-stationary reuse path.

g.title: b_cache
g.text: read packed B stream into bCacheBuf

g.title: chunk_loop
g.text: process K in chunks of nRows=4

g.title: a_fill
g.text: read packed A words into ping-pong aChunkBufs

g.title: prefetch
g.text: load next A chunk while current chunk computes

g.title: accumulate
g.text: core outValid adds rows into accumTile
repeat until all K chunks complete
